case_title: EARL MARTIN VS. VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY MARTIN, EARL VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EARL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED- SERVED JUL-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY VIJAY D. PATEL--OFFICER; DHARMESH PATEL--ASST. MANAGER/EMPLOYER; JAY ZAVERI--FRONT DESK. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTIN, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAY INVESTMENT, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
